# CRoaring prebuilt binary checksums — regenerated by CI on binary release.
#
# Format: one entry per line
#     <sha256-hex>  <artefact-filename>
#
# Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored. When this file is
# empty (first release pending), every prebuilt lookup fails SHA verify
# and Build.rakumod falls back to compiling from source — which is the
# safe default, just slower.
#
# Binary tag: binaries-croaring-0.6.0-r1
# Artefacts hosted at:
#   https://github.com/m-doughty/CRoaring-Raku/releases/download/binaries-croaring-0.6.0-r1/
